# BP-76 negative variant: independently ranged maps do not share an output path.
lang: go
file: BP-76-variant-safe.go
variant: separate-output
---
package sample

import (
	"sort"
	"strings"
)

func names() string {
	items := map[string]int{"b": 2, "a": 1}
	keys := make([]string, 0, len(items))
	for key := range items {
		keys = append(keys, key)
	}
	sort.Strings(keys)
	return strings.Join(keys, ",")
}

func unrelated() string {
	values := []string{"x", "y"}
	return strings.Join(values, ",")
}
